ramen-noodles.name: Ramen Noodles

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Spread 1 cup (266 g) baking soda out evenly on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake 1 hour (baking soda will look exactly the same). Let cool.

Place 4 cups (500 g) all-purpose flour in the bowl of a stand mixer. Whisk 2 tsp. baked baking soda, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1¼ cups water until baking soda and salt are dissolved. Add to flour in three equal additions, mixing to incorporate with a wooden spoon after each addition. Mix until dough resembles a shaggy ball; knead in bowl just to bring dough together. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit at room temperature 30 minutes. (The dough will look a bit dry, but it will relax and hydrate with time.)

Turn dough out onto a surface and knead until smooth and bouncy, about 5 minutes. Return to bowl and cover with plastic wrap or place in an airtight container. Let rest at room temperature at least 3 hours, or chill up to 12 hours. (If chilling, let dough come to room temperature before making noodles.)

Cut dough into 6 equal strips (about 123 g each). Working one at a time, flatten strips with your hands until just slightly narrower than the width of the pasta maker. Dust dough evenly and generously on both sides with some of 2 cups (256 g) potato starch or cornstarch to prevent dough from sticking. Roll dough through pasta maker 2 times per setting, starting with the widest setting and narrowing until ⅛" thick. (The dough may feel dry and break apart in the beginning, but don’t get discouraged. Simply fold it onto itself and pass it through the machine again.) Cut sheets of rolled dough into 1-ft.-long pieces.

Dust sheets of dough with a generous amount of starch and run each through pasta maker on spaghetti setting, gently wrapping noodles around your hand to form a loose bundle as they exit. Carefully set bundles on a parchment-lined baking sheet and sprinkle with more starch to keep noodles from sticking together.
Do ahead: Baking soda can be baked 1 year ahead; transfer to a jar with a tight-fitting lid and store in a cool place. Noodles can be made 2 days ahead; tightly wrap and chill.

ramp-pesto.name: Ramp Pesto

ingredients.item: Zest from 1/2 of a large lemon

instructions: {'level': '1', 'description': 'Bring a pot of salted water to a boil.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Trim root ends from ramps, being careful not to remove more of the white bulb than necessary.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Separate white and green parts, then roughly chop white parts.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Set white and green ramp parts aside separately.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'In a food processor, pulse pistachios until finely chopped.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'In a large mixing bowl, prepare an ice bath.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Add reserved ramp greens to boiling water and cook until greens have wilted, about 30 seconds.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Using a spider, immediately transfer ramp greens to prepared ice bath, swirling to chill rapidly.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Drain ramp greens and, using your hands, gently squeeze out any excess water.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Coarsely chop greens and add to bowl of food processor with reserved ramp whites and Pecorino Romano.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Pulse contents of food processor, scraping down sides as needed, until mixture forms a rough paste, about 10 pulses.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Add lemon zest and lemon juice and pulse until well incorporated, about 5 to 10 pulses.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'With food processor running, drizzle in olive oil in a thin stream until oil is fully incorporated and sauce is thick but flowing, about 30 seconds.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Season with salt.'}

raspberry-fruit-spread-without-pectin.name: Raspberry Fruit Spread Without Pectin
instructions: Combine raspberries, sugar, and lemon juice in a saucepan and mix well. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Inspect 3 jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.

Slowly bring raspberry mixture to a boil and simmer uncovered over medium heat until the mixture is no longer liquid, 40 minutes to 1 hour. Stir every few minutes and skim off any foam with a ladle or a large spoon.

Ladle raspberry jam immediately into the prepared jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any spills. Top with lids and tightly screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart. Let rest for 24 hours without moving the jars. Gently press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

recipe-for-beef-tenderloin-in-beer-comed.name: Recipe For Beef Tenderloin In Beer
recipe-for-beef-tenderloin-in-beer-comed.original_name: Receta de lomo de res a la cerveza

1/4 taza de salsa de soya o bbq

Posteriormente, en un bol grande vamos a verter las cervezas rubias o negras.
Then you'll add his oregano spoons and his garlic and his honey. With a spoon you'll be integrating quite well till you have a homogenous salsa.
Ahora, vas a incorporar la taza de salsa de soya o barbecue. Mezcla hasta integrar sin problemas.
It's time to put his back of re previously pitted into a big bowl and we'll have his bath with his beer sauce till his cover.
We cover with film paper and you'll leave to stand for about 6 hours so that you have a powerful tidal.
I recommend that you make this recipe with advance for as long as it takes to navigate very well.
A few minutes to finish the marinado, you'll heat up a frying pan with oil and the oven will preheat at 180 ° C
You'll get your back out and seal it up in the frying pan completely till a half-golden and crispy cape forms.
Now, you'll put your back sealed on a plate and then you'll put his beer sauce.

After time, you have a golden back with a spectacular and very creamy taste.
It's just gonna be your turn to let him stand for a while, cut him up and serve with some salsa.

recipe-for-gratin-endives-comedera.name: Recipe For Gratin Endives
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
Limpia las endivias, retira las primeras hojas, el tronco y un poco del centro. Lava muy bien.
En una cazuela, calienta y derrite la mantequilla. Incorpora las endivias, media taza de agua y sazona con sal y pimienta.
Cocina a fuego suave o medio por 15 minutos o hasta que queden tiernas. La olla debe estar tapada. Una vez listas, retira de la olla y deja reposar.
Para la salsa bechamel, derrite la mantequilla en una cazuela e incorpora de a poco la harina de trigo sin dejar de mezclar.
Cuando la mantequilla y la harina hayan formado un pasta o masa manejable, vierte progresivamente la leche y mezcla hasta que obtengas una salsa cremosa.
Sazona con sal, pimienta y la nuez moscada. Mezcla y cocina por un par de minutos.
Take the endivias and roll them each with the baked ham frying.
Put the endivias onto a plate, bathe with the becham sauce and scatter the mozzarella grated cheese.
Take to the oven and kitchen for 20 minutes or till you are at 180 been 3.
Once ready, remove from the oven, let an this stand and serve. Enjoy!

recipe-for-mote-with-chicharron-comedera.name: Recipes For Mote with Chiccharra

ingredients.item: Aceite o manteca de color achiote
3  dientes de ajo licuados o triturados

instructions: Corta la lonja de cerdo en cuadrados o dados medianos.
Sazona con sal, comino, ajo triturado y cebolla blanca.
Calienta la manteca de color en una paila a fuego medio y cocina los trozos hasta que suelte la grasa y queden dorados. Este proceso puede tardar entre 10 y 15 minutos.
Debes remover frecuentemente el cerdo para evitar que se queme.
Retira los chicharrones de la grasa y dejar escurrir el exceso de manteca.
Calienta el mote en la grasa donde se cocinaron los chicharrones.
Sirve el mote con los chicharrones, curtido de cebolla y culantro picado.

recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-rice-com.name: Recipe For Peppers Stuffed With Rice
recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-rice-com.original_name: Receta de pimientos rellenos de arroz
instructions: Lava bien los pimientos y corta la parte superior (mantenla para usar como tapa). Retira las semillas y las membranas internas. Reserva los pimientos mientras se prepara el relleno.

In a saucer, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil at medium heat. Add the rice and cough slightly for 1-2 minutes. Then we'll have to look at the vegetable stock, a pint of salt and let them cook with low heat till the rice's tender. Reserve.

In a frying pan, heat up the rest of the olive oil. Add onion and garlic and frying carrot and cold for 5 minutes till tender. Add the tomatoes into cubes, cumin, pimenton, salt and pepper and let them cook with medium heat for 10 minutes, till the mixture weighs slightly.
Mix the baked rice with the vegetable frying, tipping salt and pepper to taste. If you wish, add padded cheese for a more creamy touch.

place the peppers in an oven-free fountain and fill them with a mixture of rice and vegetables. Put the cover of the peppers to give an aesthetic touch and avoid them from drying too much during cooking.
The oven purifies at 180 been 3 been. Cover with an aluminum paper and a purple for 35-40 minutes. For a golden finish, remove the paper in the last 10 minutes of cooking.
Retira los pimientos del horno y espolvorea perejil fresco por encima antes de servir.

recipe-for-stuffed-eggs-with-tuna-comede.name: Recipe For Stuffed Eggs With Tuna
recipe-for-stuffed-eggs-with-tuna-comede.original_name: Receta de huevos rellenos con atún
instructions: To start with, we'll get a small pot and fill it with enough water to cook the eggs. We'll get her hot and we'll have to hope that water will break and boil.
Once the water's boiling, we'll put the eggs onto it and let them cook for 10 minutes, against the clock. He uses a timer to measure time, so that they aren't going to pass.
Take care of the cooking time of the eggs to peel the onion and mintitititily as you can.
It also takes care to open up a can of tuna, scattering it, and then placing the meat onto a deep plate. Press her with a fork to get her out of crumbs.
When the cooking time of the eggs is up, get them out of the water (with care to avoid burning), put them in a paddle and put them under a cold water jet to lower their temperature.
Now with cold eggs, remove them with care. It's easier for me to break up at both ends of every egg, and get out of there to remove the rest.
Once the eggs are pitted, use a big and sharp knife to get them minced, along.
Luego, con mucho cuidado, vamos a retirar las yemas del centro de cada mitad. Puedes ayudarte con una cuchara.
As we withdraw the yolks, we place them at the same plate as we put the leaked tuna. We will also add onion, mayonnaise, a pint of salt and another of pepper.

Now's the time to mix the stuffed ingredients. For this, you have two options. One is to use a fork and mix everything into the deep plate where we already have the ingredients. That way, you get a more irregular dough. The other choice is to get the ingredients through a kitchen robot and shredder everything. Nevertheless, do not do so to the extent that you get only a cream, because some irregularities in the pilling will give texture to your plate.

If you have decided to use the olive trees, remove the seeds (if they have them) and purify them in small ruedites or pieces as you prefer. Then put them with the tuna paste and so did the apes. Nevertheless, keep a few of them to decorate your stuffed eggs.

Con la ayuda de una cuchara, acomodaremos un poco de la pasta que venimos de preparar en el lugar que ocupaba la yema en cada mitad de huevo. Administra la cantidad de pasta para distribuirla uniformemente entre las mitades de huevos con las que cuentas.
Finalmente, decora con las alcaparras que has conservado aparte.
You can serve them at once or put them in the refrigerator for a while to get them firmer.

recipe-for-sweet-venezuelan-arepitas-com.name: Recipe For Sweet Venezuelan Arepitas

ingredients.item: ½ kg of early maize flour
♦ paper panels (diluted in two cups of water)
2 cups of vegetable oil for frying
½ kg of fresh white cheese (can be guayanese, tit, curved or hard)
Mantequilla para untar a las arepas

instructions: In a pot adds a diluted paper and a tablespoon of sweet anises and let cook till it boils. When you get into a purge, you turn it off at once.
Add 2 cups of water and let cool, this is the liquid with which you will make the dough.
In a deep bowl add the corn flour and start to pour the paper little by little until completely cover. That's bad.
Mix with the help of a spoon until the liquid has been completely absorbed by the flour.
Con tus manos limpias comienza a amasar suavemente hasta que tengas una masa compacta pero suave.
In a profound frying pan add the oil and put it onto the stove with medium heat.
Take a small portion of the dough and make a ball, and then pat with the palms of his hand until the apex remains about half an inch or more thin.
Add to hot oil the sweet arepa and with a ham spoon till it's inflated and start to get golden about 1 minute for each side.
Voltea la arepa con una pinza, y vuelve a repetir el proceso hasta que se acabe la masa.
You can fill it with an open medium and spread butter and abundant fresh white cheese. Or you can serve her with butter and cheese.
Serve and enjoy while you are warm.

recipe-to-make-a-delicious-garlic-bread-.name: Recipe To Make A Delicious Garlic Bread
recipe-to-make-a-delicious-garlic-bread-.original_name: Receta para hacer un delicioso pan de ajo
instructions: It purifies the oven at 200ºC.

Corta la baguette en 2 y crea rebanadas a lo ancho de cada mitad de 2 cm. No tienes que cortar la rebanada por completo, solo lo suficiente para poder meter la mezcla de mantequilla entre cada espacio.
Mix the remaining ingredients until you get a uniform and homogenous paste. Try and get some salt or garlic missing, as you please.
Put some of the butter mixture between the cuts you cut every half. And what's up, place it at the top of the baguette.
Envuelve cada mitad en papel aluminio.
Hornea for 15 minutes or until the part of the bark is cracking.
Saca del horno y sirve.

red-chili-shrimp-stir-fry.name: Red Chili Shrimp Stir-fry
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large, nonstick skillet over medium heat.
Pour in the shrimp and season with ¼ teaspoon of the salt.
Fry the shrimp for 1 minute on each side.
Remove the shrimp from the pan and pour in the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil.
Toss in the red bell pepper, remaining ¼ teaspoon of salt, and red pepper flakes and sauté for a few minutes until they begin to soften.
Add in the soy sauce and sauté about 1 more minute.
Toss the shrimp back into the pan and mix until everything is well incorporated and the shrimp is fully cooked, about 1 minute.
Divide the mixture evenly between 4 bowls and top with green onion.
Enjoy!

red-quinoa-with-spinach-cherry-tomatoes-.name: Red Quinoa With Spinach, Cherry Tomatoes, And Poached Eggs

ingredients.prep: trimmed, leaves torn or coarsely chopped (about 6 cups)

instructions: Bring quinoa, broth, and 1 tsp. salt to a boil in a medium saucepan. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer until quinoa is tender, 8–10 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit 15 minutes; fluff with a fork.
Meanwhile, toss onion and vinegar in a small bowl; set aside.

Bring 2” water to a boil in a large saucepan; reduce heat so water is at a gentle simmer and add vinegar. Crack an egg into a small bowl, then gently slide egg into water. Repeat with remaining eggs, waiting until whites of eggs in water are opaque before adding the next egg (about 30 seconds apart). Poach until whites are set but yolks are still runny, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to paper towels as they are done.
Toss quinoa with spinach, tomatoes, and reserved onion. Serve topped with eggs and seasoned with salt and pepper.

restaurant-style-sweet-potato-casserole.name: Restaurant-style Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Rub sweet potato skins with vegetable oil; place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until tender, about 1 hour; cool slightly. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cut sweet potatoes in half; scrape flesh into a large bowl when cool enough to handle. Discard skins. Beat sweet potatoes with an electric mixer until smooth.

Transfer 6 cups mashed sweet potatoes to a separate large bowl. Add ¾ cup brown sugar, cream, ¼ cup melted butter, ¼ teaspoon cinnamon, and salt; beat to combine. Pour sweet potato mixture into an 8x8-inch baking dish.

Place rolled oats into the bowl of a food processor or blender; pulse until finely ground. Combine oats, 2 tablespoons brown sugar, flour, and ⅛ teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl; cut in 2 tablespoons cold butter with a pastry blender or fork until crumbly. Sprinkle evenly over sweet potato mixture.

Bake in the preheated oven until sweet potatoes are heated through and oatmeal streusel is lightly browned, 70 to 80 minutes. Remove from oven, sprinkle immediately with marshmallows, and let stand until marshmallows are melted, about 10 minutes.

rhubarb-scones.name: Rhubarb Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Whisk flour, white sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. Cut butter into flour mixture with a pastry blender until crumbly and mixture resembles small peas. Freeze for 10 minutes.

Fold frozen rhubarb into flour mixture. Whisk together 1 cup heavy cream, vanilla, and 1 teaspoon orange zest in a glass measuring cup. Make a well in center of flour mixture and pour cream mixture into well; stir just until dry ingredients are moistened (do not overwork the dough).
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Gently press dough into an 8-inch round circle.
Cut the round into 8 wedges using a sharp knife. Place the scones 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.
Brush scones with remaining 2 tablespoons heavy cream and sprinkle with turbinado sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.

Whisk together powdered sugar, remaining 1/2 teaspoon orange zest, 1 tablespoon orange juice, and a pinch of kosher salt. Add up to 1/2 tablespoon more orange juice 1/2 teaspoon at a time, if needed, to reach desired consistency. Drizzle glaze over warm scones and serve immediately.

rice-salad-with-mixed-vegetables-lezzet.name: Rice Salad With Mixed Vegetables
instructions: 1. Like the recipes of the flavor salata recipes are also very interested.
2. Wait for 30 minutes in the warm water of Pirinci.
3. Wash and drain with plenty of water.
4. Take the olive oil into the pot and heat it.
5. Add rice and roast for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add hot water and salt and cook rice grains in jealous fire until softening.
7. Leave the pot from the stove and cool the rice.
8. Cook 2 bags vegetable 1000W in microwave oven for 8 minutes.
9. Blend vegetables, rice and corns in a wide container and get to salad plate.
10. Serve freshly drawn black pepper on it.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
12. You can also try practical rice salad recipe.

rice-with-brussels-sprouts-lezzet.name: Rice With Brussels Sprouts
instructions: 1. Wash the Pirinci and soak with warm water and leave for 20 minutes.
2. Wash several times and drain.
3. Peel and wash out the outer leaves of Brussels cabbage and cut the stem parts.
4. melt the margarine in a pot and roast the city.
5. Add and mix chopped rice and olive oil, roasting up to 1-2 minutes.
6. Add Brussels cabbage and broth.
7. Add and mix corn, salt and pepper.
8. Cook the pot in jealous fire until you close the cover and pull the rice water.
9.  10 dakika kadar dinlendirin.
10. blend with wooden spoon and serve as hot.

rice-with-vegetables-argiro.name: Rice With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 1 pepper red cut into small frames
1 pepper red cut into small frames

instructions: Heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the fresh onions, to polish for 2 to 3 minutes.
Then add the pepper, carrot, peas and beans, rice, broth, salt and pepper.
Mix and sprinkle with the dill.
Half the pot and simmer until holes appear on the surface (about 18 to 20 minutes). Then we withdraw it from the fire.
Cover the pot with a clean towel, place the lid on top, and leave the pilafi for 5 to 10 minutes to draw its liquids.
Serve the rice as a light meal or as a garnish in meat or chicken.

ricotta-cheesecake.name: Ricotta Cheesecake
instructions: Put ricotta in a large fine-mesh strainer set over a bowl. Drain for 30 minutes.

Arrange rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 350°. Grease an 8" springform pan with 2 1/2"-high sides with butter. Mix 1 Tbsp. sugar and breadcrumbs in a small bowl; sprinkle over buttered pan to coat. Tap out excess crumbs.

Transfer ricotta to a processor. Purée for 15 seconds. Scrape down sides of processor; purée until smooth. Add cream cheese; purée until smooth. Add the remaining sugar and all other ingredients; purée, scraping down sides occasionally, until smooth, about 30 seconds. Scrape batter into prepared pan.

Bake cheesecake until golden brown and just set, about 1 hour 15 minutes. Transfer to a rack and let cool in pan (cake will fall slightly). Refrigerate uncovered until cool, about 3 hours. Then cover and chill overnight.
To serve, wrap a warm towel around pan to release cake. Remove pan sides. Dust with powdered sugar. Cut into wedges.

ricotta-omelets.name: Ricotta Omelets
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in an 8-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. Season eggs with salt and pepper.

Add half of eggs to skillet. Cook eggs, stirring gently with a heatproof silicone spatula, until eggs are lightly scrambled and almost cooked, about 3 minutes. Spread eggs evenly to cover bottom of skillet.

Top eggs with half of ricotta, Parmesan, basil, and chives. Using spatula, fold up one-third of omelet. Roll omelet over onto itself, then slide omelet onto a plate. Repeat with remaining ingredients to make a second omelet. Top with Cherry Tomato Vinaigrette.

roast-fish-with-curry-butter.name: Roast Fish With Curry Butter

ingredients.prep: cut through root end into 8 wedges

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Toss fennel, onion, potatoes, and oil in a 3-qt. baking dish to coat; season with salt. Roast, tossing once, until vegetables are browned and softened, 35–40 minutes.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Mix in garlic, ginger, curry powder, and a pinch of salt. Simmer until color intensifies, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.
Season fish with salt and lay on top of cooked vegetables. Drizzle fish with curry butter. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and bake fish until flesh easily flakes apart with a fork, 12–15 minutes.
Serve vegetables and fish with mint scattered over.

roast-pheasant.name: Roast Pheasant

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir rosemary and thyme into olive oil in a liquid measure; set aside. Rub pheasant inside and out with salt and pepper.
Place into a close-fitting roasting pan. Pour herb oil over pheasant.

Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, then cover with aluminum foil and continue baking until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, reads 82°C (82 degrees C), about 1 hour more. Baste pheasant with pan juices every 30 minutes during baking. Remove from the oven, cover with a doubled sheet of aluminum foil, and allow to rest in a warm area for 10 minutes before slicing.

roasted-and-charred-broccoli-with-peanut.name: Roasted And Charred Broccoli With Peanuts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Slice broccoli stems on a diagonal ¼” thick. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet, toss with oil, and season with kosher salt and pepper. Gather up loose pieces of left-behind florets and finely chop. Roast stems until browned around edges, 15–20 minutes. Add vinegar; toss to coat.

Meanwhile, heat a dry medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Add florets. Season with kosher salt and pepper and cook, stirring often, until bright green and lightly charred in spots, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low; add peanuts and sugar. Cook, stirring, until nuts are golden brown. Stir in 2 Tbsp. nutritional yeast; season again.
Serve broccoli stems and florets topped with scallions, sea salt, and more yeast.

roasted-asparagus-with-garlic.name: Roasted Asparagus With Garlic

ingredients.item: Fleur de sel or coarse sea salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C.
Line a large jelly-roll pan with parchment paper. Set aside.
In a small pot, heat the oil, garlic, onion powder, and parsley on medium-low heat. Cook for 3 minutes, until the garlic mixture is fragrant but not browned.
Spread the asparagus in a single layer on the prepared pan. Lightly sprinkle with coarse sea salt and freshly ground pepper. Drizzle on the garlic-oil mixture.
Roast for 8-10 minutes, until the asparagus are bright green; do not overcook.
Transfer to a platter and serve hot.

roasted-asparagus-with-smoky-gouda-chees.name: Roasted Asparagus With Smoky Gouda Cheese Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place asparagus on a large baking sheet in one layer and season with salt. Drizzle with olive oil and toss to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven until soft, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, for the cheese sauce melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add flour and whisk until smooth and golden, about 2 minutes. Add half and half, mustard powder, and paprika; whisk for an additional 2 minutes. Add smoked Gouda cheese and whisk until cheese is melted and sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes.
Transfer asparagus to a serving tray and spoon cheese sauce on top.

roasted-indian-spiced-vegetables.name: Roasted Indian-spiced Vegetables
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Whisk olive oil, garam masala, and salt together in a small bowl. Combine potatoes, cauliflower, and onion in a large bowl. Drizzle vegetables with oil mixture and toss to coat; spread onto the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven, stirring every 10 minutes, until vegetables are tender and edges are browned, 30 to 35 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with cilantro.

roasted-okra.name: Roasted Okra
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Arrange okra in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil; sprinkle with kosher salt and pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven until okra is lightly browned and tender, 10 to 15 minutes.

roasted-potato-salad.name: Roasted Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Spread potatoes onto a baking sheet; drizzle with olive oil.
Roast in the preheated oven until tender, about 45 minutes. Let cool at least 15 minutes.
Place roasted potatoes into a large salad bowl; add eggs, bacon, celery, and green onion. Stir in mayonnaise; season with salt and pepper. Cover and refrigerate until flavors meld, about 1 hour.

roasted-potatoes-and-haddock-puttanesca.name: Roasted Potatoes And Haddock Puttanesca

ingredients.item: -ounce can whole peeled tomatoes and their juices
Freshly ground black pepper plus more

ingredients.prep: peeled, leaving root end intact, quartered

ingredients.item: Halved caper berries or 1 tbsp. drained capers

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoon oil in a medium pot over low heat. Add garlic and anchovies; cook, stirring frequently to break up anchovies, until garlic is soft but not browned, 3–4 minutes. Add red pepper flakes; cook until fragrant, about 20 seconds. Add tomato purée, increase heat to medium, and cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens, 15–20 minutes. Stir in olives; simmer for 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.

Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Place a wire rack in a rimmed baking sheet. Toss 1 Tbsp. oil, potatoes, shallots, ½ tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper in a large bowl to coat. Spread in a single layer on prepared rack. Roast on top oven rack for 18 minutes. Keep in oven.

Place fish in an 8x8x2" glass baking dish. Drizzle with remaining 1/2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt and pepper. Place on bottom oven rack and roast with potatoes until fish is just opaque in center, potatoes are golden brown and tender, and shallots are crispy, about 7 minutes longer. Place potatoes, shallots, and fish on a platter in an even layer. Spoon 11/2 cups puttanesca over (reserve remaining sauce for another use); garnish with caper berries and parsley.

roasted-sweet-potatoes-potatoes-and-sage.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes, Potatoes, And Sage

ingredients.prep: white, or Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled

instructions: Position rack in center of oven; preheat to 218°C. Combine all ingredients in large bowl; toss to coat. Spread mixture in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Roast until potatoes are tender and browned around edges, stirring occasionally, about 40 minutes. Serve roasted potatoes warm or at room temperature.

rocky-road-ice-cream.name: Rocky Road Ice Cream
instructions: Cook and stir condensed milk and cocoa in a medium saucepan over low heat until smooth and slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly. Stir in heavy cream, light cream, and vanilla. Refrigerate until cold, about 1 hour.
Pour mixture into the canister of an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's directions. Stir in marshmallows and nuts halfway through the freezing process.

romesco-arugula-egg-bagel.name: Romesco & Arugula Egg Bagel
instructions: Make the sandwiches: Spread the cream cheese evenly onto the bottom half of each toasted Thomas’® Everything Bagel, then top with the arugula.

Make the romesco sauce: In a blender, combine the red bell peppers, olive oil, almonds, tomatoes, parsley, hazelnuts, lemon juice, garlic, vinegar, salt, smoked paprika, and red pepper flakes. Blend for 5 minutes, or until smooth.

Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat until it shimmers. Crack the eggs into the oil, 2-4 at a time, depending on the size of the skillet. Fry the eggs for 6-7 minutes, until whites are cooked through and yolks are still runny. Season with salt and black pepper.
Place a fried egg on top of the arugula for each sandwich. Spoon 1-2 tablespoons of the romesco sauce over each fried egg. Cover with the top half of each toasted Thomas’® Everything Bagel.
Enjoy!

rose-pastry-lezzet.name: Rose Pastry
instructions: 1. knead bread dough on the kitchen countertops you have.
2. Cut the dough on the countertop or two parts with your hands.
3. Oil one of the dough and publish it into the oven tray that you have flour.
4. Peel potatoes and peel their shells.
5. Forkla ezip add and mix fine chopped fesle, yeast and spices.
6. Broadcast on the dough you prepared.
7. Close on the other dough.
8. Sprinkle out stones from the edges of the dough with your fingers.
9. Press two layers of dough together with the tip of a blade.
10. Remove water and olive oil and sprinkle the sea salt.
11. 11. Bake in the oven with pre-heated 180 degrees.
12. If you are going to offer the rose leg, you can serve with lentil meatballs or Russian salad.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

rubens-cooler-no.name: Ruben's Cooler No.
instructions: Line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Arrange cucumber slices in single layer on prepared sheet. Freeze until solid, about 1 hour.

Combine gin, liqueur, lemon juice, salt, and 2 cups ice in a large pitcher. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours. Stir club soda and frozen cucumber slices into pitcher. Fill 12-ounce highball glasses with ice. Pour cocktail into glasses and serve.
Do ahead: Cucumbers can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep frozen.
